citations.quote: 25/04/2026 M&S SIMPLY FOOD - SSP HAYMARKET STA GBR -1.70 1.08

findings.text: Bank statement covers 01/09/2025 to 28/04/2026 for account holder Anfal Abdalla Musa Elbushra.
Total outgoings £19,057.59 and total deposits £19,057.88 over the statement period.
Extracted transactions from 13-27 April 2026 include Uber Eats, PrettyLittleThing, M&S, Greggs, Klarna, and personal transfers.
Only ~6k of ~27k tokens were excerpted; full transaction list for Sep 2025-Apr 2026 is incomplete.

proposed_artifacts.content: Full transaction list extracted from NAP-SRC-0012 covering 01/09/2025-28/04/2026. Includes all debits, credits, descriptions, dates, and running balances. Note: OCR confidence 0.85; verify amounts and descriptions against original PDF.
proposed_artifacts.title: Full transaction list from NAP-SRC-0012

proposed_tasks.instructions: Extract the complete transaction list from NAP-SRC-0012, covering 01/09/2025 to 28/04/2026. Ensure all debits, credits, dates, descriptions, and running balances are captured. Use a higher token budget to avoid truncation. Verify OCR accuracy against the original PDF where possible.
proposed_tasks.title: Re-extract full transaction history from NAP-SRC-0012 with higher token budget and improved OCR

redaction_flags.text: Account holder name (Anfal Abdalla Musa Elbushra) may require redaction under data protection.
Transaction descriptions may contain personal data (e.g., location, merchant details).
Full bank statement contains sensitive financial data; redact before sharing outside legal team.

risk_flags.text: Incomplete extraction may lead to missing transactions critical for hardship assessment.
OCR errors could misstate transaction amounts or descriptions.
The source PDF is untrusted evidence; adversarial content could be present.

summary: Prior extraction of NAP-SRC-0012 captured only ~6k of ~27k tokens, covering 13-27 April 2026. The full transaction list for the entire 8-month period is missing. This task proposes a follow-up extraction to obtain the complete set of debits, credits, dates, descriptions, and running balances.

uncertainties.text: OCR confidence is 0.85; amounts and descriptions may contain errors.
The full transaction list for the entire 8-month period is not available in the current extraction.
The prior extraction artifact (art-042222f1db5543caa9287dc72650f758) may not reflect the complete source content.
